question: Tokenize text using tiktoken (GPT-2 encoding). Count the number of tokens.
template:
import tiktoken

text = "Hello world"
enc = tiktoken.get_encoding(???)
tokens = enc.encode(???)
print(f"Tokens: {tokens}")
print(f"Num tokens: {len(tokens)}")
answer:
import tiktoken

text = "Hello world"
enc = tiktoken.get_encoding('gpt2')
tokens = enc.encode(text)
print(f"Tokens: {tokens}")
print(f"Num tokens: {len(tokens)}")
